7 I 0

Applying to 00010011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 I 0 = 0

\boxed{00000000}
